author: NoiselessVolatileLobster
name: TopicChange
short: Allows users to seamlessly prompt a random topic change.
description: Provides an interactive way to change channel topics via slash commands, including configurable GIFs, admin approval lists, and trusted user topic suggestions.
install_msg: Thank you for installing the Topic Change cog! Use `[p]topicchangeset` to configure your settings, roles, and GIF.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord User IDs to track who submitted topic suggestions. This data can be removed upon request by removing the topic suggestion.
